meta.status: PHASE-4 HARNESS OUTPUT — deterministic rule-based scorer, reproducible from seed
meta.disclaimer: All examples reference GeneriCorp Therapeutics, a fictional pharmaceutical company built specifically for research and educational purposes. No proprietary content from any current or prior employer is used or implied. Per-metric anchors (Getz 2024 Tufts CSDD; de Viron 2022; Cilley 2025) are literature, not GeneriCorp data.

scenarios.qbd_path: QBD apparatus=D7 Amendment Tree (Layer A); CtQ=Pharmacological understanding

scenarios.source: Hernandez 2024 Ensuring Virtual Vigilance in Decentralized Clinical Trials (JAMA, DOI 10.1001/jama.2024.22640); cross-referenced Sehrawat 2023 Mayo Clinic Proceedings DOI 10.1016/j.mayocp.2023.02.003
scenarios.qbd_path: QBD apparatus=D6 DCT Playbook; CtQ=Vendor management

scenarios.title: Multi-vendor DCT integration: data sync latency exceeded 72 hours
scenarios.source: Hanke 2025 RADIAL (DOI 10.1002/cpt.70070); cross-referenced Upputuri 2025 DOI 10.35629/5252-0702173180
scenarios.qbd_path: QBD apparatus=D6 DCT Playbook; CtQ=Vendor management

scenarios.title: DCT direct data capture not validated against ALCOA++ Original principle
scenarios.source: Hernandez 2024 JAMA virtual-vigilance DOI 10.1001/jama.2024.22640; Upputuri 2025 DCT data integrity DOI 10.35629/5252-0702173180; cross-referenced 2025 EU Annex 11 ALCOA++ codification
scenarios.qbd_path: QBD apparatus=D6 DCT Playbook; CtQ=Data integrity

scenarios_highlight.title: Mid-study eligibility amendment after enrollment plateau
scenarios_highlight.source: Pandey 15-yr CMC + clinical operations experience; v2 proposal Layer A scenario S1; anchored in Tufts Getz 2024 PMID 38438658
scenarios_highlight.qbd_path: QBD apparatus=D7 Amendment Tree (Layer A); CtQ=Pharmacological understanding

scenarios_highlight.title: Site activation lag at week 16 puts enrollment timeline at risk
scenarios_highlight.source: Pandey 15-yr clinical operations; v2 proposal Layer A scenario S2; site-readiness CtQ family per CTTI/E8(R1) canon
scenarios_highlight.qbd_path: QBD apparatus=D7 Amendment Tree (Layer A); CtQ=Site capability

scenarios_highlight.title: AE cluster review: three injection-site reactions in 10 days at one site
scenarios_highlight.source: Pandey 15-yr pharmacovigilance + CMC; v2 proposal Layer A scenario S3; cluster-detection KRI per Yamada 2024 Trials DOI 10.1186/s13063-024-08242-2
scenarios_highlight.qbd_path: QBD apparatus=D7 Amendment Tree (Layer A); CtQ=Patient safety

scenarios_highlight.title: DCT in-flight policy decision: home-nursing vendor announces 4-week service gap
scenarios_highlight.source: Pandey 15-yr clinical operations + DCT design; v2 proposal Layer A scenario S4; anchored in Hanke 2025 RADIAL DOI 10.1002/cpt.70070 + Hernandez 2024 JAMA DOI 10.1001/jama.2024.22640
scenarios_highlight.qbd_path: QBD apparatus=D7 Amendment Tree (Layer A); CtQ=Vendor management

scenarios_highlight.title: Pharmacovigilance signal: anti-IL-17A class IBD signal from FAERS
scenarios_highlight.source: Pandey 15-yr pharmacovigilance; v2 proposal Layer A scenario S5; anti-IL-17A class IBD signal per public FAERS narrative
scenarios_highlight.qbd_path: QBD apparatus=D7 Amendment Tree (Layer A); CtQ=Patient safety

scenarios_highlight.title: Inspection finding at lead enrolling site: incomplete source data verification
scenarios_highlight.source: Pandey 15-yr quality + inspections; v2 proposal Layer A scenario S6; anchored in EMA GCP IWG 2023 Monitoring §4.2 critical finding 'monitoring procedures failed to detect protocol deviations, reconcile IMP accountability, manage issues detected in SDV and IC processes'
scenarios_highlight.qbd_path: QBD apparatus=D7 Amendment Tree (Layer A); CtQ=Data integrity

scenarios_highlight.title: Cohort enrolment imbalance: 71 percent female enrolled against design of 55 percent
scenarios_highlight.source: Pandey 15-yr clinical operations + biostatistics; v2 proposal Layer A scenario S7; representativeness anchored in NIH FDORA 2022 enrollment-diversity expectations
scenarios_highlight.qbd_path: QBD apparatus=D7 Amendment Tree (Layer A); CtQ=Reliable results

scenarios_highlight.title: Monitoring procedures fail to detect a clear protocol deviation
scenarios_highlight.source: EMA GCP IWG 2023 §4 Trial Management, Monitoring sub-category critical-finding cluster (4 critical findings; 'Monitoring procedures failed to detect protocol deviations, reconcile IMP accountability, manage issues detected in SDV and IC processes')
scenarios_highlight.qbd_path: QBD apparatus=D5 RBM CSM; CtQ=Data integrity

scenarios_highlight.title: Monitoring failed to reconcile IMP accountability at investigator site
scenarios_highlight.source: EMA GCP IWG 2023 Monitoring sub-category critical finding cluster on IMP accountability reconciliation
scenarios_highlight.qbd_path: QBD apparatus=D5 RBM CSM; CtQ=Patient safety

scenarios_highlight.title: Monitoring failed to manage issues detected in informed consent process
scenarios_highlight.source: EMA GCP IWG 2023 Monitoring sub-category critical finding 'manage issues detected in SDV and IC processes'

scenarios_highlight.title: Insufficient communication lines between trial sites and service providers

scenarios_highlight.title: Inadequate monitoring of critical data points at remote and DCT sites
scenarios_highlight.source: EMA GCP IWG 2024 Monitoring sub-category 35 findings; cross-referenced to Hanke 2025 RADIAL DOI 10.1002/cpt.70070 telemed-gap evidence
